pr_title: Refactor price stack field mapping — consolidate MSRP and market adjustment logic
author: platform-eng-02
change_summary: Consolidated price stack field mapping logic. Changed how market_adjustment and final_price fields are calculated from MSRP. Intended to reduce duplicate logic — introduced incorrect offset calculation for vehicle records where MSRP exceeds $45,000.
rollback_impact: Reverts intentional consolidation. Two other bug fixes in this PR would also be reverted.
targeted_fix_description: Patch the offset calculation in price-stack-mapper.ts. Estimated 20 minutes to implement and deploy.
notes: Silent failure — field-validation-service passes these values because they are numerically valid. No exceptions thrown.

pr_title: Add pagination support for large inventory queries
author: platform-eng-01
change_summary: Added cursor-based pagination for large dealer inventory queries. No pricing logic touched.
notes: Deployed 20 hours before issue onset. Unlikely to be related — no price stack logic changed.

pr_title: Update validation rules for VIN format compliance
author: platform-eng-03
change_summary: Updated VIN format validation rules. No price field validation logic changed.
rollback_impact: Low — reverts VIN validation update only.
notes: Deployed 4 days before issue. Not related.
